special.name: Silk Green & Blue
special.description: A shiny filament that depending from the direction you look at, you see dark green or dark blue

special.name: Marble
special.hex: radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 35%, rgba(30,25,25,0.55) 0%, transparent 5%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 20%, rgba(20,20,20,0.45) 0%, transparent 4%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 65%, rgba(40,35,35,0.5) 0%, transparent 6%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 75%, rgba(25,20,20,0.4) 0%, transparent 3%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 10% 80%, rgba(15,15,15,0.35) 0%, transparent 4%), #ece7de
special.description: Off-white with black specks for a classic marble look
